prompts.text: What is occupying me most right now?
What small victory did I achieve today?
What could make tomorrow a little better?
What obstacles did I face today?
What was the most memorable part of today?
What drained my energy today? What restored it?
What achievement am I proud of today?
Briefly describe what happened between you and a significant person (mother, partner, friends, sibling, pet).
Describe what happened in work and projects. What progress was made? (e.g., your job, vlog, writing a book)
Health and healthy lifestyle achievements (e.g., health/wellbeing, sports, nutrition)
Personal growth (e.g., reading, language learning, meditation, finances, new ideas, wishlist, wake-up and sleep time)
